columns.name: CreatedByContext
columns.description: The context in which the user made the change.

columns.name: CreatedByEmail
columns.description: The email of the user who made the change.

columns.name: CreatedById
columns.description: The ID of the user who made the change.

columns.name: CreatedByIssuer
columns.description: The issuer of the user's identity.

columns.name: CreatedByName
columns.description: The name of the user who made the change.

columns.name: CreatedByUsername
columns.description: The username of the user who made the change.

columns.name: CreatedDate
columns.description: The date and time when the change was made.

columns.name: DelegateUser
columns.description: The user who delegated the change.

columns.name: Display
columns.description: A user-friendly display name for the change.

columns.name: Id
columns.description: The unique identifier for the audit trail entry.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: Section
columns.description: The section of the Salesforce setup that was changed.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (in UTC) when the log entry was generated.
